queries: E2E pipeline Automating Data Preprocessing with Pipelines recent authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline Automating Data Preprocessing with Pipelines recent authoritative sources

annotations.title: Automating data preparation pipeline efficiently via Monte Carlo tree search - ScienceDirect
DiffPrep: Differentiable Data Preprocessing Pipeline Search for Learning over Tabular Data
Automating Data Pipelines with Machine Learning Insights
Automated data processing and feature engineering for deep learning and big data applications: a survey
Automate feature engineering pipelines with Amazon SageMaker | Artificial Intelligence
Use Automated Machine Learning in Pipelines - Azure Machine Learning | Microsoft Learn

content.text:
Automating data preprocessing within end-to-end (E2E) machine learning pipelines is crucial for enhancing efficiency and model performance. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that delve into this topic:

1. **"Automating Data Preparation Pipeline Efficiently via Monte Carlo Tree Search"**  
   This study introduces Auto-DP, an MCTS-based framework designed to automate data preparation. By estimating potential performance gains, it significantly reduces the time required for data preprocessing, achieving results in seconds compared to traditional methods that take hours. ([sciencedirect.com](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0020025525008667?utm_source=openai))

2. **"DiffPrep: Differentiable Data Preprocessing Pipeline Search for Learning over Tabular Data"**  
   DiffPrep presents a method that formulates data preprocessing pipeline search as a bi-level optimization problem. By transforming the search space into a continuous and differentiable one, it allows for efficient pipeline search using gradient descent, enhancing model performance on tabular datasets. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.10915?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Automate Pipeline" by Xiaotian Han**  
   This liveProject offers practical experience in implementing an AutoML pipeline using the AutoKeras functional API. It covers automated hyperparameter tuning and model selection, providing hands-on knowledge in automating data preprocessing within machine learning workflows. ([manning.com](https://www.manning.com/liveproject/automate-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Automating Data Pipelines with Machine Learning Insights"**  
   This comprehensive guide explores how machine learning can transform data pipelines by automating critical tasks, optimizing workflows, and ensuring scalability. It discusses the benefits, real-world use cases, and challenges of implementing automated data pipelines. ([xcelligen.com](https://www.xcelligen.com/automating-data-pipelines-with-machine-learning/?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Automated Data Processing and Feature Engineering for Deep Learning and Big Data Applications: A Survey"**  
   This survey reviews approaches for automating data processing tasks in deep learning pipelines, including data cleaning, labeling, missing data imputation, categorical data encoding, and feature engineering. It highlights the role of AutoML techniques in automating these processes for big data tasks. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.11395?utm_source=openai))

6. **"DiffML: End-to-End Differentiable ML Pipelines"**  
   DiffML introduces differentiable machine learning pipelines that allow for the joint training of ML models and their entire preprocessing pipeline. This approach enables the use of backpropagation for training, facilitating the automation of data preprocessing steps. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2207.01269?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Automate Feature Engineering Pipelines with Amazon SageMaker"**  
   This article discusses how Amazon SageMaker can automate feature engineering pipelines, streamlining the process of extracting, cleaning, and encoding data for machine learning algorithms. It emphasizes the importance of automating these tasks to save time and resources. ([aws.amazon.com](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/automate-feature-engineering-pipelines-with-amazon-sagemaker/?utm_source=openai))

8. **"Use Automated Machine Learning in Pipelines - Azure Machine Learning"**  
   This guide provides insights into preparing data for automated machine learning within Azure Machine Learning pipelines. It includes practical examples of data preparation steps, such as handling missing data and transforming categorical variables. ([learn.microsoft.com](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/machine-learning/how-to-use-automlstep-in-pipelines?view=azureml-api-1&utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a blend of theoretical frameworks and practical applications, providing a comprehensive understanding of automating data preprocessing in E2E machine learning pipelines.
